channel.title: Economics on Maharlikanism
channel.description: Recent content in Economics on Maharlikanism

item.title: Why Did Finance Push for Evil Rice Tariffication?
item.description:
The rice problem was already solved by the NFA which was fully integrated from import to wholesale (no middlemen).

The cheapest rice in Manila was 32 pesos retail in 2018 when the cheapest rice in Vietnam was 24 pesos.

item.title: Barter in Maharlika
item.description:
Maharlika was no stranger to natural disasters such as typhoons and earthquakes. This was proven in the practices and myths of the country:

The first man came out of the one bamboo and the first woman from the other. These, they say, married with the approval of Linog, which is the earthquake.

item.title: Overpopulation
item.description: <!-- The criteria is to compare it with a country with similar genetics and latitude. A good benchmark is Thailand which only has 72m and a GDP of $526b because of its successful family planning program from 1968 which used contraceptives, and abortion from 2014. In contrast, Vietnam implemented its 2 child policy only from 2009 and so it has a high population of 101m and lower GDP $476b. Philippines is the worst with 115m population and lower GDP than Vietnam at $461b. Egypt also bans abortion and has higher 116m population and much lower GDP at $389b. But that is from its different location and race. The Romans banned abortion because they had a conscript army made of citizens and needed to keep their population up. Again, abortion before the 8th week is not killing just as menstruation is not killing the egg. The problem with you is that you have been indoctrinated so deeply Catholic junk that it overrides your common sense. "Soul jumping" is called reincarnation and is already an established fact in Hindu and Buddhist countries. Tibetan Buddhists even have practices to control where a soul ends up in the next life and tests to prove whether a child is really someone from a past life. So the bashing of Catholic junk and the Stupid Roman God is a moral duty for those who want to see Philippines stop being corrupt and poor. 👊 Even the Europeans got rid of their own Catholic junk through the Glorious Revolution and French Revolution and Reformation and were able to progress. -->

item.title: The Origin of Modern Squatters
item.description:
Modern slums or squatter areas begain in the 1970s with the rise of neoliberalism, specifically as the Nixon Shock of 1971.

Today, with the digital revolution and the massive rise of slum populations after the neoliberal turn of the 1970s, slums have become stock features of reality television shows. source

item.title: Why Rice Tariffication is an Evil Policy
item.description:
The Rice Tariffication Law is the single biggest mistake of the Philippine Development Plan 2017-2022 called Ambisyon Natin during the Duterte Administration.

It began with the rice crisis of September 2018 as the rapid increase in the prices of rice. But this was a natural consequence of the increased taxes from the TRAIN tax reform which was supported by NEDA itself.

item.title: Dutertenomics
item.description: During his presidential campaign Duterte promised to give a comfortable life to the poor. However, the unstoppable inflation* from 2020 directly contradicts this promise since it makes life less comfortable.

item.title: How to Fix the Philippines with Maharlika 2050
item.description: The previous post explained the problem with the Keynesian Dutertenomics, which is embodied in the neoliberal economic plan called “Ambisyon 2040” by Arsenio Balisacan.

item.title: How the Philippines fell from its Industrialization Path
item.description: Like most countries, the Philippines was hard hit by Covid-19 both in 2020 and 2021. However, unlike wealthier countries, it had a severe lack of vaccines, medicines, and personal protective equipment (PPEs) needed to fight the pandemic.

item.title: How the Philippines fell from its Industrialization Path
item.description:
The whole problem is that K12 focuses on Constructivism and higher order learning (critical thinking) when the Catholic culture itself is dogmatic.

K12 works in the west because the West already removed their Catholicism. The Europeans got rid of Catholicism through their enlightenment which enshrined critical thinking.

item.title: How to Industrialize the Philippines
item.description:
Maharlikan Solutions: From Employee to Employer

Mahalikanism is anti-imperial and pro-self-reliance. We suggest the following policies to convert slave-driven, dependent Philippine economy into an industrialized and independent Maharlikan economy

Tweak the Foreign Investment Act

A glaring flaw in the FSA Amendment is the lack of environmental representation. The DENR is not part of the regulatory body (IIPC). Only DTI, NEDA, and business chambers are the significant regulators. The DENR should be added and have the same powers as NEDA.

item.title: Industries that are Natural to the Philippines
item.description:
From a survey of Maharlikan industry before Legazpi came, we can list the industries that are natural to the country.

Services

Call centers

Those people became very familiar with us. They told us many things, their names and those of some of the islands that could be seen from that place. Their own island was Sulu, not very large. They were very pleasant and conversable.
